_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of code tailoring tools and techniques
reference_document_element_description: Skill in refactoring research-quality data science code into production-grade, tested, documented, and deployable ML systems.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Skill AI-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-011 (DA, cosine: 0.484), TF-T-006 (TF, cosine: 0.451).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.635). Shared vocabulary: [code]. NICE-only terms [knowledge, tailoring, techniques, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, deployable, documented, grade, ml, production] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.896, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 15 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of code tailoring tools and techniques" and "Skill in refactoring research-quality data science code into production-grade, t" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.486 < STS 0.635 (gap -0.149). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [knowledge, tailoring, techniques] and [data, deployable, documented] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [code]. NICE-only: [knowledge, tailoring, techniques, tools]. WIDAI-only: [data, deployable, documented, grade, ml, production].
